backend/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version to 3.4.5 to align with the new JDK target.
Set the Maven Java version property to 21 to compile against the new JDK.
Change the project group ID from com.jaanus to com.kood to reflect the new company name.
Add the JJWT API dependency to support JWT token handling.
Add the JJWT implementation dependency to support JWT token handling.
Add the JJWT Jackson dependency to support JSON serialization for JWTs.
Explicitly configure the Spring Boot Maven plugin with the new main class path and execution goals.

.vscode/settings.json.general_idea: Added VS Code setting to make build configuration updates interactive.

backend/src/main/resources/application.p.general_idea: Changed the database host from localhost to 'db' to support Docker container networking.
Renamed the target database from 'match-me_db' to 'match-me'.
Enabled SQL statement logging for debugging purposes.
Added custom application properties for JWT expiration and secret key.

frontend/package-lock.json.general_idea: Added @react-three/drei to enable 3D helper components for the React Three Fiber ecosystem.
Added @react-three/fiber to enable React rendering of Three.js scenes.
Added axios to handle HTTP requests for backend communication.
Added react-router-dom to enable client-side routing in the frontend application.

frontend/package.json.general_idea: Added @react-three/drei to enable helper components for React Three Fiber.
Added @react-three/fiber to enable React renderer for Three.js.
Added axios to enable HTTP client for backend communication.
Added react-router-dom to enable client-side routing.

frontend/src/main.jsx.general_idea: Import react-router-dom components to enable client-side routing.
Replace the single App component with a BrowserRouter containing multiple route definitions.
Import specific page components to be used in the new routing structure.
frontend/src/main.jsx.human_impl:
import Frontpage from './Pages/Frontpage.jsx'
import BioPage from './Pages/BioPage.jsx'
